li.p: Page Safety: Aligned loads (MOVDQA) are used to prevent crossing page boundaries, which can trigger spurious segmentation faults if the next page is unmapped.

ul.li: Time: O(n/16) + O(1) prologue + O(1) epilogue.

g.text: pcmpeqb xmm0, xmm1 ; Compare to target char
pmovmskb eax, xmm0 ; Mask to EAX
test eax, eax ; If bit set, match found
